posts.text: West Bengal Electricity Regulatory Commission Approves 600 MW Wind-Solar Hybrid Power Procurement For CESC At Competitive Tariffs. SolarQuarter – 8 May 26 West Bengal Electricity Regulatory Commission Approves 600 MW Wind-Solar... The West Bengal Electricity Regulatory Commission (WBERC) approved CESC Limited's procurement of 600 MW of wind-solar hybrid power, enhancing its renewable portfolio. Conducted by PFC Consulting, the competitive bidding attracted six companies,... Estimated reading time: 2 minutes
